title: eclipta erecta var. prostrata
intro: Eclipta erecta var. prostrata, also known as Eclipta or Horseweed, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as promoting hair growth, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting liver health. Eclipta erecta var. prostrata can be prepared in herbal teas, capsules, or infusions, often used in traditional medicine to address various health issues.
